Localization.Description: A user changed a check box state, or cannot determine a check box state

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed the state of check box "{object.name}" to "{object.state}" on device {datafield5} during connection via {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {dst.host}
Cannot determine the state of checkbox "{object.name}" on device {datafield5} during connection of user {subject.account.name} via {protocol.layer7} protocol on host {dst.host}
